mapper.select: SELECT p.*, c.name AS category_name FROM product_blacklist b JOIN products p ON p.id = b.product_id JOIN categories c ON c.id = p.category_id WHERE b.user_id = #{userId} ORDER BY b.created_at DESC
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM product_blacklist WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND product_id = #{productId}
mapper.insert: INSERT IGNORE INTO product_blacklist (user_id, product_id) VALUES (#{userId}, #{productId})
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM product_blacklist WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND product_id = #{productId}
